products.name: Chainsaws
products.description: Professional and consumer chainsaws engineered for the most demanding forestry work.

variants.name: 572 XP® Mark II
variants.description: A high-performance professional chainsaw with X-Torq® engine technology delivering maximum power with minimal fuel consumption and emissions.

variants.name: 550 XBT Mark II
variants.description: A versatile X-Torq® chainsaw with AutoTune™ for fully automatic carburettor adjustment, eliminating manual tuning in all conditions.

variants.name: 435e II
variants.description: A lightweight and easy-to-start chainsaw ideal for landowners and occasional users. Air Injection™ keeps the air filter clean longer.

products.name: String Trimmers
products.description: Powerful and ergonomic trimmers for professional and residential lawn care.

variants.name: 525LST
variants.description: A professional straight-shaft trimmer offering excellent reach under bushes and along fence lines, with low vibration and X-Torq® engine.

variants.name: 535LK
variants.description: A loop-handle professional trimmer designed for comfort during prolonged use in dense vegetation and open areas.

variants.name: 545RX
variants.description: A high-powered brushcutter combining trimmer versatility with the capacity to clear heavy brush and saplings efficiently.

products.name: Leaf Blowers
products.description: Efficient backpack blowers for professional-grade clearing tasks with reduced fatigue.

variants.name: 570BTS
variants.description: A powerful backpack blower with X-Torq® engine for sustained professional use. Delivers exceptional air volume with reduced fuel consumption.

variants.name: 350BT
variants.description: A lightweight backpack blower ideal for homeowners who need reliable power without excessive weight during seasonal clean-up.

products.name: Hedge Trimmers
products.description: Precision hedge trimmers that deliver clean, professional cuts across all hedge types and sizes.

variants.name: 122HD45
variants.description: A lightweight and well-balanced hedge trimmer with a 45 cm double-sided blade, perfect for maintaining small to medium hedges.

variants.name: 327HED60X
variants.description: A professional articulated hedge trimmer with a 60 cm double-sided blade and fully adjustable cutting head for complex topiary shapes.
